title: Compact Mini Hacksaw & Junior Hack Saw Set – Simple Replacement – Standard Sizes – Fine Tooth Cutting Blade for Cutting Plastic & Wood, Perfect for DIY & Craft Projects (2pc Hacksaw Set)
features: This set includes both a compact mini hacksaw and a junior hacksaw, giving you the option to select the best tool depending on the task at hand. Each hacksaw comes with standard sized blades (mini hacksaw 25cm/10” blade and junior hacksaw 15cm/6” blade)

The junior hacksaw features a finger guard for safer use and a chrome plated lightweight handle for more control and better precision. The compact mini hacksaw is for one-handed use. It is made from ABS plastic and moulded with a shaped handle for easy grip, aiding control effectively

Each saw has a simple, secure, blade replacement process and are easily hung by the hanging hole on the compact mini hacksaw or by the handle of the junior hacksaw. These simple features help aid organisation for a tidier workspace
Cuts most plastics and wood. Great for cutting wood and plastic, making this set perfect for DIY, Up-cycling and artisan crafts
1x Junior Hacksaw (complete with blade) 1x Compact mini hacksaw (complete with blade)
description: This set includes 2 great hacksaws; a compact mini hacksaw and a junior hacksaw, both essential items to add to anyones toolbox! Having the option between two saws allows you to select the best tool for the task at hand. Each saw comes with standard sized blades (mini hacksaw 25cm/10” blade and junior hacksaw 15cm/6” blade.) The fine tooth blades help to give an overall smoother finish with precision. Both saws have a simple, secure, blade replacement process and are easily hung either by the hanging hole or the handle. These simple features help aid organisation for a tidier workspace. The junior hacksaw features a finger guard for safer use and a chrome plated light weight handle for more control and better precision. The compact mini hacksaw is for one handed use. It is made from ABS plastic and is moulded with a shaped handle for easy grip, aiding control effectively. PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1x Junior Hacksaw (complete with blade) 1x Compact Mini Hacksaw (complete with blade).
